markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on new content strategy and review design assets.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** Overhaul generic industry landing pages into "special snowflakes" with deep, industry-specific content, starting with Legal.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [**Legal Focus:** Prioritize Legal pages to capture market share as traditional competitors decline; lower PPC costs and high client value make it a key opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [**Content Inputs:** GrowthX will use Smith.ai's custom demo transcripts, Trustpilot/Clutch reviews, and help docs to create authentic, specific copy.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [**Design Ownership:** Smith.ai's Julian will own all custom designs for the new Call Flow Hub and industry pages to ensure brand consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

## Topics

### New Content Strategy: Industry Landing Pages

  - [**Problem:** Current industry pages are generic ("mad-libbed") and fail to demonstrate deep understanding of client use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [**Solution:** Rebuild pages as "special snowflakes" with specific, authentic content that shows Smith.ai understands each industry's unique problems and clients.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [**Example (Legal):**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [**Specific Keywords:** "client intake," "consultation booking."](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [**Specific Problems:** Lead screening for personal injury vs. child custody.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
      - [**Specific Proof:** Embed custom demo players with transcripts showing real-world scenarios.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [**Content Inputs for GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
      - [Custom demo transcripts from Emily & Danielle.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
      - [Industry-specific reviews from Trustpilot, Clutch, and G2.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Smith.ai help docs and Maddy's YouTube content.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [**Page Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
      - **\#1 Priority:** Legal.
      - [**Next:** Property Management & Real Estate (showing traffic gains).](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
      - [**Deprioritized:** Medical (not HIPAA compliant; creates sales friction).](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)

### Design & Asset Review

  - [**Call Flow Hub Designs:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [Megan shared Figma designs for the new hub.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [Julian's preference is the "gradient" version.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Action:** Maddy will add feedback directly in Figma.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [**Email Templates:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [The latest batch of PDFs and HTMLs is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [**Decision:** Maddy approved them for publication without further review to accelerate progress.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [**Call Flow Design Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [GrowthX updated the article with Maddy's requested intro.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [**Decision:** Julian will own all custom designs for this article to ensure brand consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

### SEO & Performance Tracking

  - [**Scrunch Data Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [New tags ("custom prompts," "multi-location business") show good visibility and increasing presence.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**"Citation Concentration"** (the % of LLMs citing Smith.ai) is a key metric to track for new content.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [**Virtual Receptionist Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
      - [**Decision:** Continue refreshing VR blog content in parallel with the industry pages.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This aligns with Julian and Maddy's plan to refresh the main VR product page.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Maddy:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
      - [Add feedback to the Call Flow Hub Figma file.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [Send Megan analytics on top industry pages (traffic, keywords) to create a priority list.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
  - [**Megan:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Publish the approved email templates.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
      - [Deliver more Call Flow-related content for review this week.](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
      - [Prepare to update workflows to ingest new content inputs (demo transcripts, reviews).](https://fathom.video/share/A-xkz1d4WTFWQCtsvThJieRzXnxnCQ5x?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
